canonical_definition: An evaluation protocol where an evaluator, such as GPT-4, is prompted to directly compare the outputs of two different models for the same input and decide which is better.
papers: RLCD: Reinforcement Learning from Contrastive Distillation for LM Alignment

definitions.text: Automated evaluation using GPT-4 to make binary judgments on which of two model outputs is better, applied across 1000 examples for each task.
